title: BackupResult
description: NDJSON output for the atomwrite backup subcommand. Emits one event per file (type: backup) followed by a final summary event (type: summary).

type.description: Event discriminator. 'backup' for the per-file event, 'summary' for the final rollup, 'error' on failure.

path.description: Absolute path of the source file that was backed up (absent in summary events).

backup_path.description: Absolute path of the timestamped backup file that was created.

checksum.description: BLAKE3 checksum of the backed-up content.

bytes.description: Size of the backed-up file in bytes.

files_backed_up.description: Number of files successfully backed up (present in summary event).

total_bytes.description: Total bytes written across all backups (present in summary event).

dry_run.description: True if the backup was previewed without copying.

error.description: Error message string when type is 'error'.

code.description: Machine-readable error code when type is 'error'.
